div.head: The Chargé in Brazil (Scotten) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
Rio de Janeiro, August 3, 1935—noon.
[Received August 3—11:26 a.m.]

div.p: 182. Department’s 126, July 25, 6 p.m.Not printed. At the request of the Minister for Foreign Affairs I called upon him this morning. He stated that yesterday afternoon he had had a meeting with the leaders of the majority in the Chamber of Deputies together with the reporter of the Finance Commission which is at present studying the trade agreement. As a result of this meeting he asked me to assure the Department that the trade agreement would be ratified by the end of August.
